name: Lebanese Yogurt Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 large cucumber, peeled, seeded and diced
2 cups yogurt, beaten with a fork
3 tbsp fresh mint or 1 tbsp. dried mint
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ingredients in a bowl.
2. Mix together gently with a fork until well combined.
Serve as a salad or side dish.
